title: InfiniteShulkerBox
description: Simple server-side mod that allows placing Shulker Boxes inside Shulker Boxes, making them have infinite storage.
body: This mod disables the check that disallows Shulker Boxes to be placed inside other Shulker Boxes. This way you can put an infinite amount of Shulker Boxes inside a single Shulker Box. This mod works fully server-side. --- [](https://discord.com/invite/jpFJG8dujR) [](https://ko-fi.com/kasetoatz) [](https://paypal.me/KaasToast) Looking for a fun place to play Minecraft and try out some of my mods? Come hang out on the El Basurero SMP! - **IP:** `play.ebsmp.com` - **Recommended Version:** 26.1.2 (other versions work too!) - **Bedrock Edition:** Supported - **Bonus:** Test out most of my server-side mods live in-game! For more info check the [docs](https://ebsmp.com/)!
